chunks.title: Petition for Deliverance from the Wicked
chunks.reason: The psalmist describes the nature of his enemies and their specific traps in a unified plea for rescue.

chunks.title: Prayer for Vindication and Judgment
chunks.reason: This section shifts to a direct address where the psalmist asks God to defeat his enemies and prevent their schemes.

chunks.title: Confidence in God's Justice
chunks.reason: The psalm concludes with a declaration of trust in Yahweh's care for the needy and the future thanksgiving of the righteous.
